name: odoo-shopify-docs
description: Marketing & documentation website for the Odoo–Shopify order comparator Chrome extension

scripts.build:i18n: static-i18n -l en -i en -i es -i fr -i de -i it -i pt -i nl -i pl -o dist --localesPath locales src
scripts.build: npm run build:i18n && node scripts/patch-schemas.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js && cp -r dist/* .
scripts.watch: static-i18n -l en -i en -i es -i fr -i de -i it -i pt -i nl -i pl -o dist src --watch
